title: ceratostylis pendula
intro: Ceratostylis pendula, also known as the hanging orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is native to tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ceratostylis pendula include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water or using its roots in decoctions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses.
